scripts.dev:ui: cross-env TARGET=ui NODE_ENV=development vite build --mode development -w
scripts.dev:main: cross-env TARGET=main NODE_ENV=development vite build --mode development -w
scripts.build: cross-env TARGET=ui vite build && cross-env TARGET=main vite build && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist/assets', { recursive: true, force: true })"
